# Papers explicitly excluded from paper-bot scanning.
# One identifier per line — arXiv id (NNNN.NNNNN) or Semantic Scholar
# paperId (40-hex). Inline comment after the first whitespace is ignored.
# Lines starting with `#` are comments. Manual edits welcome and survive
# bot-driven updates because the file is re-emitted sorted on every write.

382b54869bb92039a7f7c56de67d70fb2421f604  # HPCC: high precision congestion control
a022334521d88eb0181e76f01b53ce42e7dcc302  # An Open-Source Benchmark Suite for Microservices and Their Hardware-Software Implications for Cloud & Edge Systems
bbb606d78d379262c85c4615cb5d9c191cd2e3bf  # Peeking Behind the Curtains of Serverless Platforms
